title: poa matris-occidentalis
intro: Poa matris-occidentalis, also known as Western Meadowgrass or Wild Meadow Grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Poa matris-occidentalis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in topical applications for skin and wound care.
